_comment: Copy this to config.json and fill in your values. Do NOT commit config.json to version control.
_user_email_comment: The mailbox Rocky reads case folders from (James's mailbox with delegated access).
_rocky_email_comment: Rocky's own mailbox. Used as the sender for digest emails.
_cases_root_comment: Path to the Rocky Cases folder on OneDrive. Omit to use the default (James's dev laptop path).
_remy_comment: Remy invocation paths. remy_cli_path is where remy_cli.py lives on disk. remy_outputs_path is where generated drafts get written.
_remy_delivery_comment: Email addresses that receive Remy draft delivery after generation.
_kill_switch_comment: Email addresses authorized to send ROCKY STOP / ROCKY START commands.
